seoTitle: Badu Island vs Baffle West — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Badu Island and Baffle West. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Badu Island vs Baffle West: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Badu Island and Baffle West.
heading: Badu Island vs Baffle West — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Badu Island, Queensland and Baffle West, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Badu Island has a lower overall climate risk score (26/100) compared to Baffle West (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Badu Island or Baffle West safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Badu Island has a flood risk score of 32/100, while Baffle West scores 56/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Badu Island scores 27/100 for bushfire risk. Baffle West scores 49/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Badu Island or Baffle West?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Badu Island has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.98% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
